# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: cicd-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: cicd-pipeline-sa
    displayName: CI/CD Pipeline Service Account
    description: Service account for CI/CD pipeline with least privilege access

- name: cicd-sa-artifact-registry-writer
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/artifactregistry.writer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-cloud-build-builder
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/cloudbuild.builds.builder
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-compute-instance-admin
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/compute.instanceAdmin.v1
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-storage-admin
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/storage.admin
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-iam-service-account-user
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-logging-log-writer
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/logging.logWriter
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: cicd-sa-monitoring-metric-writer
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.project-id.name)
    role: roles/monitoring.metricWriter
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.cicd-service-account.email)

- name: project-id
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:projects
  properties:
    projectId: $(ref.project-id.projectId)

outputs:
- name: serviceAccountEmail
  value: $(ref.cicd-service-account.email)
- name: serviceAccountName
  value: $(ref.cicd-service-account.name)
